summary: Iteration 38 - Testing Playing XI Filtering Feature. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed match list loads (62 matches) and LiveMatch page displays correctly with Combined Prediction, Algorithm, and Claude Analysis sections.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Health check returns scheduleLoaded=true, squadsLoaded=true (version 4.1.0)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns playing_xi with team1_xi and team2_xi (8-11 players each, not full 25-man squad)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict?force=true - Returns valid prediction with team1_win_prob and team2_win_prob (1-99% range)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict (without force) - Returns cached prediction correctly
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/fetch-live - Returns liveData with isLive=true, claudePrediction, combinedPrediction (match was live during test)
POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/refresh-claude-prediction - Returns claudePrediction with team1_win_pct, weightedPrediction, combinedPrediction
Playing XI filtering logic verified - team1_xi and team2_xi contain filtered players, not full squad

frontend_verification.homepage_loads: VERIFIED - 62 match elements displayed with predictions and Playing XI labels
frontend_verification.combined_prediction_section: VERIFIED - Shows KKR 50.2% vs LSG 49.8% with phase 'MID 1ST INNINGS'
frontend_verification.algorithm_section: VERIFIED - Algorithm (Alpha x H+L) section displays
frontend_verification.claude_analysis_section: VERIFIED - Claude Contextual Analysis with verdict displayed
frontend_verification.user_inputs_section: VERIFIED - Gut feeling and betting odds inputs present
frontend_verification.model_consensus: VERIFIED - HIGH CONSENSUS indicator showing both models agree

critical_code_review_comments: Playing XI filtering logic in server.py correctly fetches from SportMonks API (live or last_match) and filters DB squad to 8-11 players
_filter_squads_to_playing_xi() function uses fuzzy name matching with 8-player minimum threshold
sportmonks_service.py parse_fixture() correctly returns team1_playing_xi and team2_playing_xi (non-subs only)
Pre-match prediction stores playing_xi with source ('live', 'last_match', 'squad_estimate') and confidence ('api-verified', 'squad-based')
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 complete. Playing XI filtering feature verified: (1) Pre-match predict with force=true returns playing_xi with 8-11 players per team (not full 25-man squad), (2) Source field indicates 'live', 'last_match', or 'squad_estimate', (3) Confidence field indicates 'api-verified' or 'squad-based', (4) Fetch-live endpoint returns liveData with claudePrediction and combinedPrediction, (5) Refresh-claude-prediction endpoint works correctly. Match ipl2026_015 (KKR vs LSG) was live during testing showing 40/1 at 5 overs.

playing_xi_filtering.description: Pre-match predict returns playing_xi with team1_xi and team2_xi containing 8-11 players (filtered from full squad)

fetch_live_endpoint.description: Returns liveData with isLive, claudePrediction with team1_win_pct/team2_win_pct, combinedPrediction with phase-based weights

combined_prediction_phase_weights.description: Phase-based weighting working - 'MID 1ST INNINGS' shows Algo 40% / Claude 60%
